title: Outreach Connector Documentation
description: Connect Shielva to Outreach to sync prospects, sequences, accounts, calls, and mailings via OAuth2.

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: The Outreach connector syncs sales engagement data from Outreach into the Shielva knowledge base using the Outreach REST API (JSON:API format) via OAuth2 Authorization Code flow.

sections.title: Setup
steps: Create an OAuth app in Outreach → Settings → API → Apps
Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
Set the Redirect URI to your Shielva callback URL
Enable scopes: prospects.read, sequences.read, mailings.read, calls.read, accounts.read
Enter credentials in Shielva and authorize

endpoints.description: Verify access token and return authed user
Exchange refresh token for new access token

sections.title: Pagination
sections.content: Outreach uses JSON:API cursor pagination. The connector follows links.next until null. Default page size: 100.

sections.title: Normalizers
sections.content: Each resource is normalized into a ConnectorDocument. The source_id is a 16-char SHA-256 hex prefix of '<type>:<id>' ensuring stable, collision-resistant IDs. JSON:API attributes are unwrapped from data.attributes automatically.

sections.title: Retry Policy
sections.content: Network and rate-limit errors are retried up to 3 times with exponential backoff (base 1s, max 30s, factor 2, jitter 0.5s). Auth errors (401/403) are never retried and surface immediately.

items.fix: Add the required scope in Outreach → Settings → API → Apps
